metadata_information.title: A review of alternative debt strategies
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

title_statement.title: A review of alternative debt strategies

document_description.abstract: This comprehensive review of debt strategies includes recent debt proposals that recommend alternatives to market-based debt workouts. Proposals differ widely depending on whether they seek new lending or broad based debt relief and forgiveness. Their common, explicit aim is to reduce the negative net resource transfers to the creditors and to ease the debt burden of the highly indebted countries.
document_description.usage_terms: See World Bank Access to Information (https://www.worldbank.org/en/access-to-information)
document_description.disclaimer: The Policy Research Working Paper Series disseminates the findings of work in progress to encourage the exchange of ideas about development issues. An objective of the series is to get the findings out quickly, even if the presentations are less than fully polished. The papers carry the names of the authors and should be cited accordingly. The findings, interpretations, and conclusions expressed in this paper are entirely those of the authors.
